  • Uses of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan

    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan with type parameters of type EMediplanObject
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EMediplan<E extends EMediplanObject,G extends EMediplanGender,M extends EMediplanMedicament<E>,I extends EMediplanIdentifier>
    Base class to model an eMediplan document object, be it of CHMED16A or CHMED23A specs.
    interface 
    EMediplanExtendable<E extends EMediplanObject>
    Base interface for an eMediplan object that is extendable, that is, that may contain a list of extensions.
    class 
    EMediplanMedicament<E extends EMediplanObject>
    A base class for an eMediplan medicament object.
    class 
    EMediplanPatient<E extends EMediplanObject,G extends EMediplanGender,I extends EMediplanIdentifier>
    Base class for modelling an eMediplan patient object, be it for CHMED16A or CHMED23A.
    class 
    EMediplanPatientMedicalData<E extends EMediplanObject>
     
    Subinterfaces of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    EMediplanExtendable<E extends EMediplanObject>
    Base interface for an eMediplan object that is extendable, that is, that may contain a list of extensions.
    interface 
    EMediplanHealthcareProCarrier<P extends EMediplanHealthcarePerson,O extends EMediplanHealthcareOrganization>
    Interface for an object that carries information about healthcare professionals in the context of an eMediplan document.
    interface 
    EMediplanIdentifier
    Extension of the EMediplanObject interface that adds a method to convert an eMediplan object translatable to a FHIR Identifier to such an identifier.
    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan that implement EMediplanObject
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EMediplan<E extends EMediplanObject,G extends EMediplanGender,M extends EMediplanMedicament<E>,I extends EMediplanIdentifier>
    Base class to model an eMediplan document object, be it of CHMED16A or CHMED23A specs.
    class 
    EMediplanHealthcareOrganization<A extends EMediplanPostalAddress>
     
    class 
    EMediplanHealthcarePerson
    Abstract base model for an eMediplan HealthcarePerson object, used in both CHMED16A ePrescription and CHMED23A eMediplan documents.
    class 
    EMediplanMedicament<E extends EMediplanObject>
    A base class for an eMediplan medicament object.
    class 
    EMediplanPatient<E extends EMediplanObject,G extends EMediplanGender,I extends EMediplanIdentifier>
    Base class for modelling an eMediplan patient object, be it for CHMED16A or CHMED23A.
    class 
    EMediplanPatientMedicalData<E extends EMediplanObject>
     
    class 
    EMediplanPosology
    Base class for an eMediplan posology object.
    class 
    EMediplanPostalAddress
     
    class 
    EMediplanRisk
    This sould be an enum representation of the CDSCODE table of HCI INDEX used by the eMediplan specification paired with RiskCategory.
    class 
    EMediplanRiskList
    Models the RiskCategory object of eMediplan, that contains risks grouped by category.

  • Uses of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a

    Subinterfaces of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ChMed16AExtendable
    Interface for objects that contain extensions.
    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a that implement EMediplanObject
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChMed16AEMediplan<M extends ChMed16AMedicament>
    This is the main eMediplan object, called Medication in CHMED16A specification.
    class 
    ChMed16AExtendedPostalAddress
    This is the postal address object used for the ePrescription backport of HealthcareOrganization, which includes the country code, while the vanilla CHMED16A does not.
    class 
    ChMed16AExtension
    Extensions can be used to include additional information within an eMediplan that is not explicitly modelled by the ChMed specification.
    class 
    ChMed16AHealthcareOrganization
    The model for a healthcare organization, to which the healthcare person belongs.
    class 
    ChMed16AHealthcarePerson
     
    class 
    ChMed16AMedicament
    Information about a medication as well as its dosage.
    class 
    ChMed16APatient
     
    class 
    ChMed16APatientId
     
    class 
    ChMed16APatientMedicalData
     
    class 
    ChMed16APatientMedicalDataMeasurement
     
    class 
    ChMed16APostalAddress
    A postal address.
    class 
    ChMed16ARecommendation
    Model of a polymedication check recommendation.
    class 
    EPrescription
    Model according to the specifications of eMediplan in the context of ePrescription.
    class 
    EPrescriptionMedicament
    Extension of the ChMed16AMedicament for the revision 3 of the CHMED16A ePrescription format.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChMed23APosology
    Describes when and what amount of medication must be taken.

  • Uses of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail

    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail that implement EMediplanObject
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CyclicDosage
    Describes the application of a medication at constant intervals.
    class 
    DailyDosage
    Describes when (morning, moon, evening, night) and how much of a medication must be applied daily, in a structured form.
    class 
    FreeTextDosage
    Describes an unstructured dosage consisting of free text.
    class 
    PosologyDetail
     
    class 
    SequenceDosage
     
    class 
    SingleDosage
    Describes a single application of a medicament.

  • Uses of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail.application

    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail.application that implement EMediplanObject
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Application
    Specifies a dose that must be applied at certain times, either at a precise moment or in a day's segment (i.e.
    class 
    ApplicationAtTime
    Specifies a precise moment in time for a medication to be applied.
    class 
    ApplicationInSegment
    Specifies a day segment (morning, noon, evening or night) when a medication must be applied.

  • Uses of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail.dose

    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail.dose that implement EMediplanObject
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EMediplanDose
    This corresponds to the DosageObject definition in ChMed23A.
    class 
    IntervalDose
    This is what ChMed23A calls DosageFromTo.
    class 
    RangeDose
    A dose specifying a minimum and a maximum amount of medication.
    class 
    SimpleDose
     

  • Uses of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail.sequence

    Class
    Description

    DosageSequenceElement
     
    class 
    Pause
     
    class 
    SequenceElement
     

  • Uses of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail.timed

    Classes in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.posology.detail.timed that implement EMediplanObject
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DaySegmentsDosage
    Specifies the day segment (morning, noon, evening, night) when a medication should be applied.
    class 
    DaysOfMonthDosage
    Specifies on which days of the month a medication must be applied.
    class 
    DoseOnlyDosage
    Specifies a dosage without specifying a precise moment for the intake.
    class 
    EmbeddableTimedDosage
    A TimedDosage that can be embedded within a WeekDaysDosage, a DaysOfMonthDosage or a SingleDosage Inheritors: DaySegmentsDosage DoseOnlyDosage PreciseTimesDosage
    class 
    IntervalDosage
    Specifies the application of a medication with a minimal interval between two applications.
    class 
    PreciseTimesDosage
    Specifies precise times when a medication must be applied.
    class 
    TimedDosage
    Specifies the moment and amount of a medication application.
    class 
    WeekDaysDosage
    Specifies on which days of the week a medication must be applied.

  • Uses of EMediplanObject in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a.repetition

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Repetition
    Indicates how often a prescription can be repeated or how long the prescription is valid.
    class 
    RepetitionDuration
     
    class 
    RepetitionNumber
     
    class 
    RepetitionNumberAndDuration
    Combination of both RepetitionNumber and RepetitionDuration.
